description: Serverless GPU compute service contract v1 — 18 operations across endpoint deployment, job execution, template and volume management.

operations.description: List all serverless endpoints with status, GPU type, and active worker count
operations.name: endpoint_list

operations.description: Get details for a single endpoint including configuration, scaling, and health
operations.name: endpoint_get

operations.description: Deploy a new serverless endpoint with container image, GPU type, and scaling config (incurs charges)
operations.name: endpoint_create

operations.description: Update endpoint configuration (scaling, GPU, container image)
operations.name: endpoint_update

operations.description: Permanently delete a serverless endpoint (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: endpoint_delete

operations.description: Get endpoint health metrics — workers ready, jobs in queue, request rate
operations.name: endpoint_health

operations.description: Submit an async job to an endpoint — returns job ID for polling
operations.name: job_submit

operations.description: Submit a job and block until completion — returns result directly
operations.name: job_submit_sync

operations.description: Stream job output as it's generated (SSE/chunked)
operations.name: job_stream

operations.description: Get status and output for a submitted job by ID
operations.name: job_status

operations.description: Cancel a queued or running job
operations.name: job_cancel

operations.description: Retry a failed job with the same input
operations.name: job_retry

operations.description: Purge all queued jobs for an endpoint (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: queue_purge

operations.description: List available templates (container image + config presets)
operations.name: template_list

operations.description: Create a template for reusable endpoint/pod configuration
operations.name: template_create

operations.description: List network volumes (persistent storage across restarts)
operations.name: volume_list

operations.description: Create a network volume for persistent model/data storage (incurs charges)
operations.name: volume_create

title: serverless-v1
